Topic: Towards the Continental Assembly of the Synod
Title: Prague.synod2023.org
Annotation: A new website to follow all the work in Prague
Content:
As of today, the website for the European Continental Assembly of the Synod, which will be held in Prague from 5 to 12 February, is online.

The website can be found at: https://prague.synod2023.org/

Currently, the website provides an updated programme and some Assembly matters. As we get closer to the event, it will be updated with more details and materials. For each day, a gallery and a general summary of the proceedings will be provided. The proceedings can be streamed through the site, and then possibly re-watched on the CCEE’s YouTube channel.

Until 9 February, there will be constant updates on the events. For the second part of the Assembly, from 10 to 12 February, reserved only for the Presidents of the national Bishops’ Conferences, there will be no presence of the press, and there will only be a final communication at the end of the proceedings.

The website is the main channel through which the facts and events of the Continental Synod Assembly will be transmitted. In Prague, there will also be a multilingual Media Team to support accredited journalists and provide information to their language groups.

As of today, the official CCEE Facebook page is also active: https://www.facebook.com/CCEEofficial as well as the official Instagram channel: https://www.instagram.com/mediaccee/

Accreditation for the European Continental Assembly of the Synod can be obtained by sending an email to accreditation.media@ccee.eu

We look forward to seeing you in Prague.
